abilities.name: 잠복
abilities.description: 교체로 나온 상대에게 2배 데미지로 공격할 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.
Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.
